description: Arranges children in a native WPF row-and-column grid.

margin.description: Outer WPF Thickness separating the grid from adjacent layout.

horizontalAlignment.description: Horizontal placement of the grid within its parent.

verticalAlignment.description: Vertical placement of the grid within its parent.

rows.description: Ordered row definitions used by child row indexes.

columns.description: Ordered column definitions used by child column indexes.

children.description: Grid cells placed against the declared rows and columns.
